name: Entrée Resources Ltd.
description: Entrée Resources Ltd. is a Canadian mining company that holds a unique carried joint venture interest in a portion of the Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mining project in the South Gobi region of Mongolia. Entrée owns a 20% to 30% participating interest in the Entrée/Oyu Tolgoi JV Property, which includes the Hugo North Extension and Heruga copper-gold deposits operated by Rio Tinto and the Mongolian government-controlled OTLLC. The company is in the development and royalty-like stage, with its value tied to the expansion of one of the world's largest copper-gold mines.
